name: 08 - Implicit Variables Example with Interface Descriptions
author: sherwyn
templateContent:
## Apply configs to interfaces based on descriptions previously applied ##
## If pushing a new description, be aware that "contains" logic may need to change ##
## This is a simple example, but can use regex for more complicated and nuanced descriptions ##

#foreach ($interface in ${__interface})
#if ($interface.description.contains("vmnic")) 
    interface $interface.portName
    description $interface.description
    switchport mode access
    switchport access vlan 100

#elseif ($interface.description.contains("PNP"))
    interface $interface.portName
    description $interface.description
    switchport mode access
    switchport access vlan 200

#elseif ($interface.description.contains("3802"))
    interface $interface.portName
    description $interface.description
    switchport mode trunk
    switchport trunk allowed vlan  add 200,300,500

#elseif ($interface.description.contains("9115"))
    interface $interface.portName
    description $interface.description
    switchport mode trunk
    switchport trunk allowed vlan  add 400

#else
#end 
#end

#elseif ($interface.description.contains("PNP"))

#else
#end 
#end
